ftbquests.chapter.extreme_reactors.quest: The &9Fluid Port&r is used &o&bto insert&r vapors like &3Steam&r, or &o&bextract&r the product of the turbine, like &1Water&r if inputing &7steam.&r Because of this, you'll need &ntwo&r for your &2Turbine&r.
The &cPower Tap&r extracts power, and is &nrequired&r to complete the multiblock.
Turbine Ports
When building the &6Reprocessor&r, you will need &o&bat least&r one &aCollector&r and &3Waste Injector&r.
The &aReprocessor Collector&r must be placed &o&bin the center of the bottom face&r of the structure.
The &cWaste Injector&r must go &o&bin the center of the top face&r, which is where you'll &npipe in&r or &ninsert waste&r like &dCyanite Ingots&r.
Importing Waste
The &2Fluidizer&r is a &o&bcustomizable multiblock&r that has a &nminimum&r size of &o&b3x3x3&r.
You can transport the &bfluids&r with pipes from &cMekanism&r
The Fluidizer
The &dSolid access port&r allows for fuel to be &cinputed&r and waste &aoutputed&r from the reactor, while the &eEnergy tap&r stores and outputs the &creactors&r energy.
Reactor Interacting Components
The &6Reprocessor&r is a &o&b3x3x7&r multiblock structure that has &o&bspecific rules&r to complete the construction of the multiblock.
The heart of this multiblock is the &dController&r, and can be placed in &o&bany vertical face&r as long as it is not an &bedge/frame&r.
Just like the &2Reactor&r, the frame must be built out of &eCasings&r, but the walls can be &3Turbine Glass&r instead!
Turbine Construction Parts
Now that we have some &dCyanite&r from our &o&bsmall reactor&r, we'll want a way to &o&breprocess&r that &o&3waste&r into &nsomething useful&r. To do this, we'll need to build the &6Reprocessor&r.
This takes a lot of &dCyanite&r, so start &o&bstocking up&r! You might want to upgrade to a &o&bbigger reinforced reactor&r as well.
Reprocessing the Waste
These three parts can be placed on &o&bany vertical face&r as long as they aren't on the frame!
The &cPower Port&r is used to &o&bgive power&r to the multiblock machine to process waste.
The &9Fluid Injector Port&r is used &o&bto inject&r the liquid needed, which will depend on the type of waste injected. For &dCyanite&r, that means &o&1water&r!
The &cOutput Port&r is used &o&bto output&r the reprocessed material. You can &eRight-click&r it &o&bto grab&r the material out by hand, or &o&bpipe it out&r for automation.
When your &2Reinforced Reactor&r turns its coolent to &7vapor,&r you can send it to a &aturbine&r to &egenerate power&r and turn it into &bwater.&r
You can make &bturbines&l&r 5x5x10&r with &abasic parts&r, but much &ebigger&r with &6reinforced parts&r.
Just like the &creactor,&r you will need to place the &bturbine&r controller in the wall.
Turbines
When the reactor &o&6burns&r up fuel, it creates &o&dwaste&r that you will want to collect. That is what the other &3Solid Access Port&r is for!
Make sure to set it to &o&coutput&r, then &o&9pipe it&r into some type of storage.
Any #forge:ingots/cyanite
The Waste
&cReactors&r can also be used to &o&bheat up&r coolants like &o&bwater&r to create &o&bvapor&r, like &7Steam&r.
To do this, you'll need to build a &2Reinforced Reactor&r. I'd also suggest on it being bigger than a &o&b3x3x3&r.

To input a &o&bcoolant&r to the &creactor,&r you'll need two &9Forge Fluid Port&r. This will port in &nany fluids&r into the reactor. This will also be used to &o&bexport the vapor&r created in the reactor.
If you want, you can create a &eMekanism Fluid Port&r to convert the &o&bfluid steam&r into the mekanism &o&bgas steam&r instead.
The Actively Cooled Reactor
Your first&c basic reactor&r has a max size of &l5x5x5,&r though they &ecan be smaller&r, you can make by following these directions:
&lFirst:&r Make the &6walls&r and &6floor&r of &abasic Reactor Casing&r and &aGlass.&r
&lSecond:&r Add a &bbasic Reactor controller&r to one wall.
&lThird:&r add &dtwo basic Reactor Solid Access Ports&r, one set to &cInlet (red)&r the other &aOutlet (green)&r you can attach &epumps&r from other mods to these.
&lFourth:&r Add a &ebasic Reactor Active Forge Energy Power Tap&r, which will &astore&r and &apipe out&r &eenergy&r from the &creactor.&r

&lFifth:&r Then you want &9basic Reactor Fuel Rod&r in a &ediagonal&r pattern across the floor and build them up till &eone block&r from the roof where on top of the&9 Fuel rods&r you put &bbasic Reactor Control Rods.&r
Then fill in the empty spots of the roof with &aReactor casing&r. if done correctly the &etextures&r will change slightly to show it has become a &4Multi-block reactor.&r

You can build &cbigger reactors&r with &9reinforced forms&r of the previously mentioned blocks instead of &abasic ones&r, also the &etaller&r a &creactor&r is, the &emore fuel&r it will use and hold while the &6energy&r it will make increases, but the &awidth&r will help it &bcool.&r
The First Reactor
These are the used to create &cbasic reactors&r, and will be used for the &6outer walls&r and &6edges.&r
Reactor Casings
Any #forge:ingots/graphite
Graphite Bars
Just like the other &cmultiblocks,&r the frame will need to be made out of &7Casings&r, while the faces can be made out of &9Glass&r.
Fluidizer Construction Parts
The &2Fluidizer&r needs &o&epower&r to operate, so a &6Power Port&r is required and to take the product the &2Fluidizer&r makes you'll be needed a &cOutput Port&r as well.
Fluidizer Ports

The &2Fluidizer&r can operate in one of &o&b3&r modes: &o&bSolid&r to &o&bFluid&r, combining &o&b2 Solids&r into a &o&bFluid&r, or combining &o&b2 Fluids&r into a new &o&bFluid&r. This all depends on the type of &aInjectors&r you use for the multiblock.
For example, if you want to convert &1Blutonium&r into a fluid, you can use &o&b1&r &aSolid Injector&r,

If you want to combine &o&btwo solids together&r into something &nnew&r, you'll build the multiblock with &o&b2&r &aSolid Injectors&r. If you want to combine &o&btwo fluids&r, you'll use &o&b2&r &9Fluid Injectors&r.

This might seem confusing, but is &o&6important&r for progression. For example, you'll want to convert &cMagentite&r into a fluid in the &2Fluidizer&r first, then send it to a &eReprocessor&r with &5Ludicrite&r to create &7Ridiculite&r.
Fluidizer Injectors
Using the &6Reprocessor&r, we can combine &o&beverything&r we've made so far to make &o&bnew ingots&r.
You might need a &aFluidizer&r to complete this step!
One of the &o&bhardest materials&r to get in the mod! This block can be used as a &ecoil&r in your &bturbine.&r
Any #forge:storage_blocks/insanite

These are used to make the &bturbine&r inside of the &cmulti-block build&r, place the &bturbine bearing&r inside the &emiddle block&r on the floor on the inside of the &amachine,&r then place your &6rotator&r &6shafts&r so they touch the &eroof,&r finally attach &6rotator&r &6blades&r to the &6shaft,&r the &bmore and longer&r they are, the more &7vapor&r your &bturbine&r can process.
Turbine Shaft
This is the &amain block&r you will be using to build the &breprocessor frame&r.
The Frame
Combining &bRidiculite Ingots&r with &4Rossinite&r will create &cInanite Ingots&r.
Any #forge:ingots/inanite
Now that you have &4Rossinite&r, you can mix it with &bBenitoite&r to create &6Insanite Ingots&r.
&bBenitoite Ore&r can be found in the &cNether&r.
Any #forge:ingots/insanite

Reactor &2Moderators&r are materials placed inside of a reactor where there aren't fuel rods &o&bto change how it performs&r, based on the &nproperties&r of the moderator. These are placed inside of the reactor &o&bduring construction&r.
The &o&9rarer&r the material is, the &nbetter&r of a &2Moderator&r it is. Leaving the reactor &o&bempty&r means you are using the &7air&r inside as a moderator, which isn't that great.
If you are looking for something &o&acheap&r in the early game, try using &3Graphite Blocks&r!
Reactor Moderators
After placing this in a &creactor&r you will be able to view its stats, including &epower controls&r fuel levels&6, and &ctemperature levels&r.
&oA few tips:&r
&cHigher core heat&r means &emore fuel used.&r
&cHigher casing heat&r &eincreases energy production&r, and &bcoolent conversion&r.

You can choose either &amanual&r or &bautomatic&r &ewaste ejection&r mode, &aManual&r means the pipe attached to the &dSolid port&r must call for the waste i.e &cMekanism&r p&aipes on pull mode&r, while &9automatic&r outputs the &ewaste&r to the pipe anyways.
&9Fuel rods&r and will be placed inside of a &creactor&r in a &ediagonal&r patteren, towering up to the &6roof&r where on the very top will be the &bControl rods&r.

If you interact with a &bcontrol rod&r, you will get a &6small slider&r on the bottom of a &lUI&r which allows you to "push the &9fuel rods&r" which makes them use &aless fuel&r, but make &eless energy&r.
The fuel for your first &cbasic reactor&r should be &auranium.&r
Reactor Control Rods
By using the &3Fluidizer&r, we can combine &1Blutonium&r with &eYellorium&r to make &2Verderium&r.
When used &o&bas fuel&r in a reactor, &2Verderium&r produces &4Rossinite&r as a reactant. &nWe need this&r!

To use &2Verderium&r as a fuel, you'll need to make &9Fuel Injection Ports&r for your reactor. Don't forget &o&bto empty&r out the fuel currently in your reactor, or make &o&ba new reactor&r for this purpose.
Making Rossinite

&aExtreme Reactors&r is a mod focused on &epower generation&r though &bturbines&r and &creactors.&r This quest-line will act as your &aguide&r through this world of &eelectricity,&r once you have &agenerated power&r you can use it for other mods like &cMekanism&r
Any #c:ingots/uranium
Welcome to &2Extreme Reactors
Once you've built a fully functional &6Reprocessor&r, you can pump in &ePower&r, &9Water&r and &dCyanite&r to create &1Blutonium&r.
This can be used as a fuel for your &2Reactor&r, and creates its own &o&3waste&r called &5Magentite&r.
Any #forge:ingots/blutonium

ftbquests.chapter.hostile_neural_network: The &dSimulation Chamber&r is the main machine within HNN. \\n \\n When given power, it will run simulations based on the &bData Model&r that is placed inside. The power required also depends on the Data Model placed inside, and can be seen within the Model's tooltip.  \\n \\n The machine also requires at least one &9Prediction Matrix&r to run a simulation. \\n \\n The result of the simulation will be output onto the Matrix. Simulations will always produce some kind of &eGeneralized Prediction&r, which can be used in various crafting recipes. They also vary depending on the origin of the mob in the Data Model. \\n \\n If the simulation succeeds, you will receive a &dMob Prediction&r based off of the model. The higher the tier of the Data Model used, the higher the success rate is for a simulation.

The &5Loot Fabricator&r is the machine that gets you that sweet, sweet loot from Mob Predictions. \\n \\n When given power and a successful Mob Prediction, you will be able to choose which item you'd like to get from that mob's Data Model. The machine will remember your choice, so it can be automated. \\n \\n Notable Mob Predictions: \\n \\n - &dEnder Dragons&r for &dDragon Eggs&r \\n - &2Zombies&r for Iron \\n - &0Withers&r for &5Nether Stars&r
Upgrade the tier of the Data model. Faulty Data models cant be upgraded
You cant put the Chaos Dragon Data Model inside the Simualting Modeling and you should not put it inside the Merger!

Once you make your first Data Model, you'll need to level it up to be useful. \\n \\n Data Models start out at the first tier: &7Faulty&r. You'll need to at least level it to &aBasic&r if you'd like to run some simulations on it! \\n \\n Once placed inside of the Deep Learner, the HUD will tell you how many kills are required to level it up. You can also see this info in the tooltip of the Model itself, although you'll have to do math.

&6Hostile Neural Networks&r (or HNN for short) is a mod based around simulating mob kills for loot! \\n \\n To do this, you will be collecting 'data' on mobs, then running simulations from the data to create their drops!

The &9Deep Learner&r is one of the core components of HNN. \\n \\n With this item, you can right click to open up a HUD and store &6Data Models&r to gather data while killing mobs. \\n \\n Each Learner can hold 4 Data Models, and as long as you have the Learner anywhere in your inventory, it will collect data for the models placed inside! \\n \\n Note: You can have multiple Deep Learners in your inventory, and it will count the kills for all Data Models inside all of the Learners.

ftbquests.chapter.mystical_agriculture.q: You cant see this Item in JEI.
You can look at it while pressing U on a basalt block from enviromental materials
&dEssence&r is the starting point for all of your growing needs in Mystical Agriculture.
&eInferium Essence&r is the base tier of all essences. You can get this from mining, killing mobs, or by making seeds to grow them!
To make the bigger and better essences, you'll need to make an &9Infusion Crystal&r.
This special &eDust&r is dropped from the Wither and the Ender Dragon when killed by an &dEssence Weapon&r enchanted with &dMystical Enlightenment&r.
The best seed in the modpack.
It cant be tick accelerated with torcherino or block boosters. And cant be put into a botanypot.
&bProsperity Shards&r are used as one of the main crafting mats for several of the recipes in Mystical Agriculture, like seeds, ingots, and more.
&dMystical Agriculture&r is a mod based around the concept of growing your resources with crops. Use crops to grow essences used to make materials, mob drops, tools, armor and possibly even more!
The &9Tinkering Table&r is used to upgrade &aEssence Gear&r with &dAugments&r.
Augments can be made using the Infusion Altar. Just like the Essences, Augments have tiers!
You cant see this Item in JEI.
You can look at it while pressing U on a marble block from enviromental materials

The &aWatering Can&r is used to increase the speed that crops grow. Higher tiers have a larger area of effect. To use this, fill it up with some water by right clicking some water, then hold right click near your crops to water them!
Shift+right click while looking in the air with the watering can to enable auto-watering.
&eEssence Farmland&r will increase the growth speed of the seeds. The certain seeds will require certain farmlands to be planted on.

&9Growth Accelerators&r very slightly increase the growth speed of a seed when placed directly underneath the farmland. Each tier has a range of how many blocks "up" it can accelerate, with Inferium being the lowest at 12.
The &9Infusion Altar&r is the bread and butter of creating &aSeeds&r in the mod. You'll need to create the Altar itself, as well as 8 Pedestals.
Placing the Altar down first will show you where to put the Pedestals. To craft a seed, place the required mats in each pedestal, then give a redstone signal to the Altar.
To start making &aEssence Gear&r, you'll need to make the Inferium Armor first.
This gear can be upgraded to higher tiers, just like the Essences. You can also &9Augment&r them with the &bTinkering Table&r!
This special &eDust&r is dropped from the Wither and the Ender Dragon when killed by an &dEssence Weapon&r enchanted with &dMystical Enlightenment&r.
To awaken your Supremium Essence, you'll need to create a new Altar and 4 new Pedestals, as well as a new type of pedestal called the &cEssence Vessel&r.
The Essence Vessels will require the starter Element Essences to fill: Fire, Water, Earth, and Air.
Most seeds are simple to make, but to make &9Mob Seeds&r, you'll need to head to the Nether to pick up some &8Soulium&r.

With the stone and ore that you find, you'll need to use these to make the &3Soulium Dagger&r and &3Soul Jars&r. Using the dagger to kill mobs, you'll be able to gather their &bsouls&r, which are used in the Infusion Altar to create the respective mob seeds.
Alternatively, you can fill Soul Jars inside of the &3Soul Extractor&r by inserting a jar and using mob items to fill them. For example, adding Rotten Flesh will give a portion of a Zombie Soul.
This special essence is used for making most of the &6Creative&r items.
Starting with Inferium Essence, you can create ingots to make both Essence &9Tools&r and &9Armor&r.
Essence tools can be upgraded to higher tiers, and just like the Armor, they can be &5Augmented&r in the &3Tinkering Table&r.
